quotes.text: You have not experienced true fear until you have deployed a fix that works in staging but makes production worse.
quotes.author: Bryan Cantrill
quotes.source: Platform as a Reflection of Values, 2018

quotes.text: The first rule of programming: if it works, don't touch it. The second rule: see the first rule.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Don't deploy on Friday. Actually, don't deploy on Thursday either because you might have to fix it on Friday.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Everybody gangsta until someone runs SELECT * FROM users in production with no WHERE clause.
quotes.author: Unknown
